zh.Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾史道頓 哈羅德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Staunton於大約1195年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾史道頓 哈羅德時，他的父親William de Staunton33歲，母親Athelina Stratton Musters29歲。他於1225年與Alice Ros在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1231年住在英國。他去世於1260年10月26日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Staunton于大约1195年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾史道頓 哈羅德时，他的父亲William de Staunton33岁，母亲Athelina Stratton Musters29岁。他于1225年与Alice Ros在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1231年住在英国。他去世于1260年10月26日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Staunton was born about 1195, in Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Staunton, was 33 and his mother, Athelina Stratton Musters, was 29. He married Alice Ros in 1225, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He lived in England in 1231. He died on 26 October 1260, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Staunton est né environ 1195, à Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Staunton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Athelina Stratton Musters, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice Ros en 1225, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il a vécu à Angleterre en 1231. Il est décédé le 26 octobre 1260, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

Er hat 1225 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1231 hat er in England gelebt. Er starb am 26. Oktober 1260 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Stauntonが約1195年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアスタウントン ハロルドで生まれた時，父William de Stauntonは33歳，母Athelina Stratton Mustersは29歳であった。1225年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでAlice Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1231年にはイギリスに住んでいた。彼は1260年10月26日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで66歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Staunton(이)가 대략 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 스타운턴 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Staunton(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Athelina Stratton Musters(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Alice Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1231년도에 영국에서 살았다. 그는 1260년 10월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Staunton nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Staunton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Athelina Stratton Musters, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Ros em 1225, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele viveu em Inglaterra em 1231. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Staunton родился около 1195 г. в местности стаунтон харолд, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Staunton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Athelina Stratton Musters, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Ros в 1225 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он жил в местности Англия в 1231 году. Он умер 26 октября 1260 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия.
